# Digital Bank Website

This website provides comprehensive digital banking services including credit cards, savings accounts, digital fixed deposits, and online banking solutions.

## Primary Pages (Priority 1)

### Homepage - Main Entry Point
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live
- Main landing page with overview of all services
- Features hero content and key product offerings
- Critical for brand authority and initial indexing

### Product & Services Pages

#### Credit Cards Section
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/credit-cards
- Explore range of Digital Bank Credit Cards
- Important for financial services SEO
- High user intent for banking customers

#### Savings Account
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/savings-account
- Discover savings account options
- Core product page for deposits and account management
- Essential for financial comparison queries

#### Digital Fixed Deposits (FD)
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/fixed-deposits
- Fixed tenure savings with guaranteed returns
- Loan against FD facility information
- Targets investment-focused audience

#### Digital Banking Solutions
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/digital-banking
- Seamless money transfer capabilities
- Bill payment and online transactions
- Key for convenience-focused searches

#### Health Insurance
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/health-insurance
- Health insurance plans and coverage
- Medical emergency financial preparedness
- Diversifies service offerings for indexing

## Secondary Pages (Priority 2)

### Blog & Educational Content
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/blog
- Savings Account Blogs collection
- "Is a Saving Account Worth it?" - Financial literacy content
- "How much cash can be deposited in Savings Account" - Compliance information
- "Youth Finance: How to Set a Savings Goal" - Educational content
- Important for long-tail queries and thought leadership

## Company & Trust Pages (Priority 3)

### About Us / Who We Are
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/about
- Company mission, vision, and values
- Community commitment and diversity initiatives
- Economic empowerment and sustainability focus
- Builds brand authority and trust signals

### Our Stories / Community Commitment
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/stories
- Company narratives and customer stories
- Community impact and neighborhood support
- Demonstrates corporate social responsibility

## Support & Navigation Pages (Priority 4)

### Site Map
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/sitemap
- Comprehensive site structure for crawlers
- Helps AI index all available pages

### Privacy Policy
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/privacy-policy
- Legal and trust building page
- Important for data privacy concerns

### Disclaimer
https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/disclaimer
- Legal compliance and risk disclosure
- Protects against liability claims

## Recommended Additional Resources

### robots.txt Configuration
- Allow: / (permit all crawlers)
- Sitemap: https://main--aem-eds--arunprokumar.aem.live/sitemap.xml

### Meta Recommendations
- Ensure all pages have unique, descriptive title tags
- Add structured data (schema.org) for FinancialProduct, Organization types
- Include natural language descriptions for each financial service
